memberdef.type: std::function< nb::object(const ObjId &, const string &, const KeyT &)>

memberdef.name: LookupGetter

memberdef.type: const std::map< std::string, LookupGetter< unsigned int > >
memberdef.name: uintKeyGetters

briefdescription.para: Convert Python object wrapping path or ObjId or Id into ObjId.

briefdescription.para: Copy object, return the copied vec object.

memberdef.argsstring: (const string &type, const string &p, unsigned int numdata)

briefdescription.para: Create a new vector of class type at path p, with numdata elements.

memberdef.argsstring: (const string &name, const Cinfo *cinfo, const Finfo *finfo, const string &prefix="")
memberdef.name: fieldDocFormatted

briefdescription.para: Common function to get value fiields.
Get a map of field names to Finfo*.

memberdef.argsstring: (const nb::object &obj, const string &fieldName, const string &msgType, MsgDirection direction)
memberdef.name: getNeighbors

detaileddescription.para: Get neighbors of obj connected on fieldName, of type msgType, in direction direction.

inbodydescription.para: Sets up the Elements that represent each class of Msg.
Sets up the Elements that represent each class of Msg.

briefdescription.para: Get a list of Msg objects.
Model loaders built into Shell, others can be implemented in Python.
